message:
feat(abi): add runtime policy enforcement to process/VM syscall wrappers

Integrate the runtime_policy decide/observe membrane pattern into
several syscall ABI wrappers that were previously unguarded:

- personality(): gate on ApiFamily::Process, deny returns -EPERM
- process_mrelease(): gate on ApiFamily::VirtualMemory with pidfd
  validation, deny returns -EPERM
- Additional wrappers follow the same pattern: call decide() before
  the raw syscall, observe() after with success/failure status

Each guarded syscall now:
1. Calls runtime_policy::decide() with the relevant ApiFamily and
   size/flag arguments to get a MembraneAction
2. If action is Deny, sets errno to EPERM and returns -1 immediately
3. If allowed, proceeds with the raw libc::syscall
4. Calls runtime_policy::observe() with the profile and outcome

Also includes corresponding test coverage for the new policy
enforcement paths and updates beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-w2c3.4","title":"Track 3: Reverse-Core Surface Completion (All Planned Rows)","description":"## Background
Implement all planned reverse-core surfaces as explicit runtime artifacts with conformance and proof hooks.

## Design
Use mandated mapping: surface -> failure class -> alien math -> compiled deterministic runtime artifact.

## Acceptance Criteria
All PLANNED reverse-core rows transition to owned execution beads and evidence plans.

## Notes
No surface left without artifact class, tests, and closure criteria.","design":"Use mandated mapping: surface -> failure class -> alien math -> compiled deterministic runtime artifact.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
All PLANNED reverse-core rows transition to owned execution beads and evidence plans.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression cases.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in this bead (strict and hardened mode where relevant).
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include: exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist artifacts (logs, diffs, reports) with deterministic naming and retention policy for triage/replay.
- Enforce tooling hard requirement for this track: `/dp/asupersync` (deterministic orchestration/traceability) and `/dp/frankentui` (deterministic diff/snapshot analysis outputs).","notes":"No surface left without artifact class, tests, and closure criteria.

### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set documented in bead comments/notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets documented (top 3 likely failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry documented for this bead linking logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.

Tooling contract: track closure requires deterministic orchestration + traceability via `/dp/asupersync` and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI analysis surfaces via `/dp/frankentui`.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T03:15:25.108822852Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:05:51.022119079Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-artifact","extreme-optimization","feature-parity","gap-closure"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-w2c3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1j4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:34Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-w2c3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-w2c3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:34Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-w2c3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-w2c3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:34Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-w2c3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-w2c3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:34Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1189,"issue_id":"bd-w2c3.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"This track closes all planned reverse-core rows by grouping them into coherent implementation waves while preserving all required artifact classes from AGENTS.md.","created_at":"2026-02-13T03:16:21Z"}]}

Replaced approximate e constants with std::f64::consts::E in xdr_double_roundtrip.\n  - Replaced manual dangling pointer sentinel with std::ptr::dangling_mut::<c_char>().\n  - Purpose: clear pre-existing clippy blockers so crate/workspace clippy can pass under -D warnings.\n\nVerification (all CPU-heavy commands via rch):\n- rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-abi --all-targets -- -D warnings => PASS\n- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets => PASS\n- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings => PASS\n- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test unistd_abi_test -- --nocapture => PASS (25/25)\n- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check => FAIL due broad pre-existing formatting drift outside this slice (notably rpc_abi.rs, dlfcn_abi.rs, plus import ordering in unistd_abi_test.rs under repo format policy).\n\nCurrent slice status:\n- SysV IPC ABI policy integration + tests: complete for touched scope.\n- Remaining track-wide work in bd-w2c3.4.3 is still open; keeping issue in_progress.","created_at":"2026-03-02T23:03:12Z"},{"id":1252,"issue_id":"bd-w2c3.4.3","author":"RainyPelican","text":"Next bd-w2c3.4.3 sub-surface completed: process_vm + process_madvise policy integration.

Code changes:
- crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs
  - Added runtime_policy decide/observe integration for process_vm_readv/process_vm_writev/process_madvise (ApiFamily::VirtualMemory).
  - Added deterministic Deny handling (EPERM) and missing-payload repair short-circuit (EFAULT) for null iov + nonzero counts/len.
  - Added helper process_vm_missing_iov_payload and generalized repair helper to policy_repair_enabled.

Tests:
- crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/unistd_abi_test.rs
  - Restored existing SysV IPC tests and added VM tests:
    - process_vm_readv_null_iov_nonzero_counts_fails_cleanly
    - process_vm_writev_null_iov_nonzero_counts_fails_cleanly
    - process_madvise_null_iov_nonzero_len_fails_cleanly

Verification (all CPU-heavy commands via rch):
1) rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test unistd_abi_test -- --nocapture => PASS (28/28)
2) rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets => PASS
3) rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings => PASS

Formatting note:
- Workspace cargo fmt --check still reports broad pre-existing drift outside this slice (rpc_abi/dlfcn_abi/etc).

Operational note:
- During patching, unistd_abi_test.rs was transiently truncated by a tool failure; file was restored from HEAD and all intended SysV + VM tests were re-applied and revalidated in this update.
","created_at":"2026-03-02T23:34:15Z"},{"id":1253,"issue_id":"bd-w2c3.4.3","author":"RainyPelican","text":"Third bd-w2c3.4.3 slice completed (cross-ISA/VM adjunct wrappers):

Code updates:
- crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs
  - personality: added runtime_policy decide/observe instrumentation and Deny path (EPERM).
  - process_mrelease: added runtime_policy decide/observe instrumentation and Deny path (EPERM).

Tests:
- crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/unistd_abi_test.rs
  - Added process_mrelease_invalid_pidfd_fails_cleanly.
  - Existing SysV IPC + process_vm/process_madvise tests retained.

Verification (rch):
1) cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test unistd_abi_test -- --nocapture => PASS (29/29)
2) cargo check --workspace --all-targets => PASS
3) cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings => PASS

Note:
- This comment captures incremental diffs atop the already-landed local changes for SysV IPC/process_vm/process_madvise in the same bead.

 {"id":"bd-w2c3.5","title":"Track 4: Runtime-Math In-Progress Closure","description":"## Background
Close all runtime-math IN_PROGRESS rows with calibrated production evidence and explicit value accounting.

## Design
Prioritize unresolved items: risk, pareto, cohomology, and incomplete cross-family integration; bind each to value proofs.

## Acceptance Criteria
No IN_PROGRESS runtime-math row remains without closure evidence or explicit retirement decision.

## Notes
Maintain deterministic hot-path constraints and cost budgets.","design":"Prioritize unresolved items: risk, pareto, cohomology, and incomplete cross-family integration; bind each to value proofs.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression cases.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in this bead (strict and hardened mode where relevant).
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include: exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist artifacts (logs, diffs, reports) with deterministic naming and retention policy for triage/replay.
- Tooling hard requirement applies: use `/dp/asupersync` for deterministic orchestration/traceability and `/dp/frankentui` for deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI analysis output.","notes":"Include per-family adverse-event and latency trade-off diagnostics.

### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist

- Evidence index entry documented for this bead linking logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.

- `hardened_failures_max=0`
